scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n bff,vite -c cyan,green "pnpm server:dev" "wait-on tcp:localhost:3001 && vite"
scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build wasm-engine --target web --out-dir ../src/engine/wasm --out-name wasm_engine && printf '# wasm-pack output committed to git — do not replace with *\n' > src/engine/wasm/.gitignore
scripts.test:context: node --test src/context/ContextCompiler.test.js src/context/ContextConflict.test.js src/context/ContextPhase2.test.js src/context/ContextPhase3.test.js src/context/ContextPhase4.test.js src/context/DocBuilder.test.js src/context/TemplateCatalog.test.js src/context/SeedAnchor.test.js src/context/NlIntake.test.js src/context/ProvenanceTree.test.js src/context/CanonicalForm.test.js src/context/SynonymQuotient.test.js src/context/ProvenanceNarrative.test.js src/context/RoboticsPredicate.test.js src/robotics/Robotics.test.js src/service/ContextService.test.js src/service/RoboticsService.test.js src/service/BffClient.test.js src/command/ApproveDecisionCommand.test.js src/command/EditAdmissibleCommand.test.js src/command/AnswerQuestionCommand.test.js src/command/AddDocEntryCommand.test.js src/command/DocEditCommand.test.js src/controller/GraspController.test.js src/view/GraspGhostMath.test.js src/view/GraspFunnelMath.test.js src/context/IntakeAssist.test.js src/context/RoleKpiCatalog.test.js src/context/IntakeVocabulary.test.js src/context/WizardCatalog.test.js src/context/ParametricAssets.test.js src/view/FeedbackMath.test.js src/view/CheckFeedbackMath.test.js src/view/TemplatePreviewMath.test.js
